articles.title: BlackRock Rejects Solana ETF, Citing Low Demand and Technical Issues
articles.description: TL;DR BlackRock’s Decision: BlackRock, a major issuer of Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs, has definitively ruled out launching a Solana ETF in the near future. Despite Solana’s rapid growth, BlackRock cites low demand and technical concerns as reasons for this decision.
